Wiki / Glossary

Glossary

Quick definitions for the terms used across the game and this wiki.

Core

Blending & income

TermMeaning
BlendOne milkshake made in the blender. Manual blends are clicked; auto-blend makes them for you.
Manual blendA shake you trigger yourself. Pays slightly more per shake than passive output and earns more XP.
Passive income ($/s)Cash earned every second from employees and locations, without clicking.
Global multiplierThe master multiplier on income — built from active flavors, countries, recipe development, and quality/marketing upgrades.
Mix multiplierThe part of the global multiplier that sums your active flavors' multipliers.
Special outcomeA bonus result on a blend (Crusty, Baked, Swirled, Golden, Fan Favorite, Creamy, Decorated) — they stack.
ComboA bonus that triggers when a specific set of flavors is active together.
Systems

Economy & progression

TermMeaning
XP / LevelExperience from active play. Your level (from lifetime XP) gates features and pays cash rewards.
PayrollThe monthly wage cost of all your employees, deducted periodically.
TaxA cut taken from passive income; reduced by Tax Optimization research.
Automation factorA small reduction applied to passive income versus manual blends, so clicking is always worth a bit more.
BuffA timed income multiplier from a power-up, goal, achievement, VIP, or event. Buffs stack multiplicatively.
Featured comboA spotlighted combo that rotates every 50 game-days for a temporary +30% bonus.
VIP customerA random visitor who pays a cash + buff reward for completing a requested combo.
ContractA timed catering order: blend a target before the deadline for cash + XP.
Game dayThe in-game time unit that drives rent, payroll, contracts, and combo rotation.
Controls & notationShortcuts FAQCommon questions
